reasoning: I have voted before for Mamata, and she gave me the rice card and the health card and the money for my daughter's school. Shantanu Thakur is a good man, a Matua man, and it makes me proud he is a minister now — yes, that is something. But the cards come from the state, from Mamata, not from Delhi. If I vote BJP and they change these things, what will I do? My daughter needs her school fees, my ration still costs two rupees. I know Mamata gave me this. That is the only promise I can trust.
primary_drivers: State welfare schemes delivery (Khadya Sathi, Swasthya Sathi, Kanyashree)
Trust in TMC's continued state government control and proven benefits
Risk aversion—fear that BJP government would not prioritize these welfare cards
